title: Statement of profit or loss
summary: 9609 A Level — income statement structure, gross profit, and operating profit.
learningObjectives: Interpret a statement of profit or loss.
Distinguish gross profit and profit for the year.

simpleExplanation.title: The income story
simpleExplanation.summary: The statement of profit or loss shows revenue, costs, and profit over a period — revealing trading performance.
steps: Revenue minus cost of sales = gross profit.
Finance costs and tax to profit for year.

sections.content: **Statement of profit or loss** (10.1.1) opens **Topic 10 Accounts**. Practise **layout labels** and **calculations**.

sections.label: Mark a profit or loss question
